## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between GrowthX and Firework to discuss content strategy and performance metrics.](https://fathom.video/share/vSqs-5PoghUQhmfAxmwt64m-x7-nrWu3?tab=summary&timestamp=3.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [March performance shows best results so far with 5.5k clicks, 1M impressions, and 14 leads generated](https://fathom.video/share/vSqs-5PoghUQhmfAxmwt64m-x7-nrWu3?tab=summary&timestamp=534.0)
  - [Content strategy shifted focus from clicks/impressions to lead generation in January](https://fathom.video/share/vSqs-5PoghUQhmfAxmwt64m-x7-nrWu3?tab=summary&timestamp=780.0)
  - [Need to improve tracking of lead progression through sales funnel](https://fathom.video/share/vSqs-5PoghUQhmfAxmwt64m-x7-nrWu3?tab=summary&timestamp=840.0)
  - [Removing "live streaming" terminology from content to reposition as video shopping platform](https://fathom.video/share/vSqs-5PoghUQhmfAxmwt64m-x7-nrWu3?tab=summary&timestamp=1500.0)
  - [Publishing delays with Webflow need to be urgently addressed](https://fathom.video/share/vSqs-5PoghUQhmfAxmwt64m-x7-nrWu3?tab=summary&timestamp=2040.0)

## Topics

### Monthly Performance Review

  - [March metrics: 5.5k clicks, 1M impressions, 14 leads generated](https://fathom.video/share/vSqs-5PoghUQhmfAxmwt64m-x7-nrWu3?tab=summary&timestamp=534.0)
  - [Best month so far in terms of clicks and impressions](https://fathom.video/share/vSqs-5PoghUQhmfAxmwt64m-x7-nrWu3?tab=summary&timestamp=538.0)
  - [Lead generation back to January levels (14 leads)](https://fathom.video/share/vSqs-5PoghUQhmfAxmwt64m-x7-nrWu3?tab=summary&timestamp=534.0)
  - [Adding \~40 new articles per month, now at \~50 total published](https://fathom.video/share/vSqs-5PoghUQhmfAxmwt64m-x7-nrWu3?tab=summary&timestamp=611.0)

### Content Strategy Evolution

  - [Initially focused on clicks/impressions metrics](https://fathom.video/share/vSqs-5PoghUQhmfAxmwt64m-x7-nrWu3?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)
  - [Shifted in January to prioritize lead generation](https://fathom.video/share/vSqs-5PoghUQhmfAxmwt64m-x7-nrWu3?tab=summary&timestamp=780.0)
  - [Now creating content based on topics that previously generated leads](https://fathom.video/share/vSqs-5PoghUQhmfAxmwt64m-x7-nrWu3?tab=summary&timestamp=717.0)
  - [Exploring new content ideas like AI video curation, customer retention tools](https://fathom.video/share/vSqs-5PoghUQhmfAxmwt64m-x7-nrWu3?tab=summary&timestamp=2110.0)

### Lead Attribution Challenges

  - [Currently only tracking first blog interaction as lead source](https://fathom.video/share/vSqs-5PoghUQhmfAxmwt64m-x7-nrWu3?tab=summary&timestamp=840.0)
  - [Need to improve tracking of lead progression through sales funnel](https://fathom.video/share/vSqs-5PoghUQhmfAxmwt64m-x7-nrWu3?tab=summary&timestamp=840.0)
  - [Suggestion to implement micro-conversions (e.g. report downloads) for better attribution](https://fathom.video/share/vSqs-5PoghUQhmfAxmwt64m-x7-nrWu3?tab=summary&timestamp=1020.0)

### Rebranding Away from "Live Streaming"

  - [Need to remove/recontextualize "live streaming" terminology in content](https://fathom.video/share/vSqs-5PoghUQhmfAxmwt64m-x7-nrWu3?tab=summary&timestamp=1500.0)
  - [Repositioning as video shopping engagement platform](https://fathom.video/share/vSqs-5PoghUQhmfAxmwt64m-x7-nrWu3?tab=summary&timestamp=1510.0)
  - [Will search existing content to identify areas needing updates](https://fathom.video/share/vSqs-5PoghUQhmfAxmwt64m-x7-nrWu3?tab=summary&timestamp=1852.0)

### Content Publishing Delays

  - [Last 2 weeks of articles not published due to Webflow issues](https://fathom.video/share/vSqs-5PoghUQhmfAxmwt64m-x7-nrWu3?tab=summary&timestamp=1955.0)
  - [Identified as top priority to resolve ASAP](https://fathom.video/share/vSqs-5PoghUQhmfAxmwt64m-x7-nrWu3?tab=summary&timestamp=2040.0)
  - [Team to set up call with Webflow rep to address](https://fathom.video/share/vSqs-5PoghUQhmfAxmwt64m-x7-nrWu3?tab=summary&timestamp=2040.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Implement search functionality to identify "live streaming" mentions in content](https://fathom.video/share/vSqs-5PoghUQhmfAxmwt64m-x7-nrWu3?tab=summary&timestamp=1852.0)
  - [Cameron to update default lead magnet content after Easter](https://fathom.video/share/vSqs-5PoghUQhmfAxmwt64m-x7-nrWu3?tab=summary&timestamp=1899.0)
  - [Set up urgent call with Webflow rep to resolve publishing delays](https://fathom.video/share/vSqs-5PoghUQhmfAxmwt64m-x7-nrWu3?tab=summary&timestamp=2040.0)
  - [Prateek to review new content topic suggestions from Ritesh/Sam](https://fathom.video/share/vSqs-5PoghUQhmfAxmwt64m-x7-nrWu3?tab=summary&timestamp=2110.0)
  - [Sam to share additional content ideas and AI video curation details with Prateek](https://fathom.video/share/vSqs-5PoghUQhmfAxmwt64m-x7-nrWu3?tab=summary&timestamp=2351.0)
